page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

In terms of performance, the AMD EPYC 7H12 processor delivers average results across several standard benchmarks, though raw compute metrics show some limitations. Single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU benchmarks register in the lower percentiles, indicating that this instance is not designed for compute-bound workloads. However, memory-intensive operations show more balanced performance. The instance achieves an average passmark memory score of 2504.49 and a cached read-only memory bandwidth of 400.15 GB/sec. Uncached large-block memory bandwidth is lower, with read and write speeds of 30.8 GB/sec and 15.87 GB/sec respectively.

The ecs.r6a.2xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring a large memory footprint without the premium cost of high-performance compute cores. It performs reliably on database operations, scoring 2710.01 on Passmark database tests and handling 7.13 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. Static web serving throughput is also stable at 6.77 GB/sec. This profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-cached databases, Redis deployments, mid-sized web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications that prioritize RAM capacity over raw CPU speed.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, with no local storage or GPU resources. The hardware configuration provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Benchmark data indicates average performance in memory-cached operations, Redis SET transactions, and static web serving, alongside weaker raw single-core and multi-core CPU compute metrics. This makes the instance a cost-efficient option for memory-intensive workloads that do not demand intensive CPU processing. It is best suited for memory-cached databases, Redis deployments, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r6a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 8 AMD EPYC cores and 64 GB RAM, designed for databases and caching.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high RAM density for caching and database workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average performance in Redis SET operations and database benchmarks
Best suited for memory-cached databases, Redis, and web serving
